title: Eye handoff: age guard prevents false-positive on session start
desc: Eye CWD-fallback path was picking up a previous session large JSONL and firing handoff immediately on Eye restart. Fix: if using CWD fallback (no explicit SessionJsonl registered) and file is older than 30min, skip until genuine new growth. Uses jsonlAge (was discarded as _ before).
steps: Verify eye tick no longer fires handoff on start with old JSONL: wkappbot eye tick
Check AppBotEyeClaudeStatusStreamer.cs for 30min age guard after CWD fallback
If handoff fires on startup, check card.SessionJsonl registration -- explicit beats fallback
author: claude
